overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through the Badlands desert. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle along highways, through a tunnel, across a large bridge, and into a small desert settlement before returning to the open road. The scene features warm afternoon lighting, rocky desert terrain, and cyberpunk-industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with rocky cliff faces

agents.ego_description: cruising along the desert highway at high speed, hands on the steering wheel

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock outcrops lining the left side of the highway
metal safety barrier running along the right edge of the road
tall wooden utility poles with wires stretching along the highway
hazy mountains visible on the horizon beneath the clear sky

segments.scene_description: Driving along a sunlit desert highway with rocky formations on the left and guardrails on the right. Power lines stretch into the distance alongside the empty road, with mountains visible on the horizon.

events.description: entering dark tunnel with graffiti-covered concrete walls
exiting tunnel back to bright daylight

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed through the short tunnel section

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls covered in colorful spray paint and tags
overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a brief tunnel section with urban graffiti art on the walls, transitioning from natural sunlight to artificial lighting before emerging back into the desert afternoon.

scene_state.functional_zone: large suspension bridge with industrial structures

events.description: entering the suspension bridge structure with tall steel towers
overtaking a white vehicle on the left side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: accelerating across the bridge while passing another vehicle

notable_agents.action: white sedan being overtaken in the left lane of the bridge

entered.detail: massive steel bridge tower with cable supports rising above the roadway
thick steel suspension cables running from the towers to the bridge deck
distant futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon beyond the bridge
large metal electrical transmission towers alongside the bridge

segments.scene_description: Crossing a massive suspension bridge with steel towers and cables, the Night City skyline visible in the distance. The vehicle overtakes another car on the left while industrial pylons line the right side of the bridge deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert settlement main street with retro buildings

events.description: passing under large billboard gantries marking the town entrance
approaching the water tower and colorful motel buildings along the main street

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly while navigating through the town main street

notable_agents.action: vehicle driving ahead on the main road through town

entered.detail: large metal structure spanning the road with advertising billboards mounted overhead
tall cylindrical water tower with spherical top standing above the town
colorful two-story motel with balconies and retro signage
scattered palm trees lining the street through the desert settlement
fuel station with pumps and canopy visible on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Entering a small desert town marked by large overhead billboards, passing palm trees and colorful motel buildings. The prominent water tower stands against the sky as the vehicle drives down the main street toward a gas station.

events.description: exiting the town back to open desert highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating back to highway speed on the open road

entered.detail: reddish rock outcrops returning alongside the highway
metal safety barrier resuming along the right side of the road
mountain horizon visible again as the town recedes

segments.scene_description: Leaving the desert settlement behind, the vehicle returns to the open highway stretching through arid terrain. Rocky formations and guardrails line the road once more as distant billboards appear against the mountainous backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a sunlit desert landscape that transitions from open highways into an urbanized settlement before returning to the arid wilderness. It begins along a rocky desert road lined with power lines and distant mountains, moving steadily forward until the natural light vanishes as the vehicle enters a graffiti-covered tunnel. Upon emerging back into the afternoon sun, the scene expands across a massive suspension bridge with steel towers, passing another car while the Night City skyline looms in the distance. The camera then shifts into a small desert town, gliding past colorful motels, palm trees, and a prominent water tower before heading toward a gas station. Finally, the vehicle leaves the settlement behind, returning to the open highway where rocky formations and distant billboards reappear against the mountainous horizon.
